name: Ground Beef and Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Make small beef patties and set aside.
2. Peel potatoes and slice thinly.
3. Peel onions and slice thinly.
4. Melt butter in a frying pan.
5. Place onions in the butter and lightly cook, just until transparent. Remove and place on a plate.
6. Place beef patties in the butter. Brown quickly. Do not cook through.
7. Place the potatoes in the bottom of a casserole dish with the beef patties and onions on top.
8. Pour water into the pan in which the onions were cooked, then pour over the potatoes.
9. Bake at 400°F for 45 minutes.
